subject: [Portal] Add logs to STDOUT
commit_message:
[Portal] Add logs to STDOUT

This commit add STDOUT appender to root level logging.

Issue-ID: OOM-2514
Change-Id: If8c80e4726d4c5d4adc5a39ed6df8297548e27fc
Signed-off-by: Dominik Mizyn <d.mizyn@samsung.com>
